name: Garlic Cheese Rolls
recipeInstructions:
Place the roll ingredients into a bread machine on the dough setting and press start. When the dough is finished, remove it from the machine. Turn the dough out onto a floured countertop or cutting board. Gently roll and stretch the dough into a 24-inch rope.
Grease an 8-inch pie pan. Divide the dough into 18-24 pieces. Shape each piece into balls and place them into the pie pan. In a small bowl, combine the melted butter and crushed garlic. Pour over the rolls. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese. Cover and let rise in a warm oven for 30-45 minutes until doubled.
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Place the rolls in the oven and bake for 10-15 minutes until golden on top. Remove from the oven, cut apart, and spread with butter for "yummies" in your tummies!
